utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes fields for all 7 items. Now check completeness: 
- destination: Provided (Lisbon, Portugal) — complete.
- travel_dates: Provided (September 15-19, 2024) — specific dates — complete.
- transportation: Has details and a cost; however, lacks specific flight details (airline name, flight numbers, exact times). The format asks for flight details with costs; the entry is generic but does include some details and a cost. This is borderline; to be strict about “fully specified,” it should have concrete flight details. Mark as not fully specified.
- accommodation: Hotel selection with costs is provided (Adventure Lodge, 4 nights, €220). No address or room type, but name and cost are present — sufficient per format — complete.
- activities: Selected activities with costs are provided (three items with costs) — complete.
- additional_services: Provided (“None”) — acceptable — complete.
- total_budget: Provided as a single approximate figure but not a complete cost breakdown summing line items. The format requests a complete cost breakdown; since individual costs are listed elsewhere but not broken down within this field, this is not fully specified as a breakdown — mark as not fully specified.
Thus, 5 items are fully specified out of 7.
